## Checklist

- [ ] Skill has all 8 required sections (Law, When to Use, When NOT to Use, Process, Red Flags, Completion Format, Why This Matters)
- [ ] All Rationalization Red Flags use *italic* phrasing
- [ ] Completion Statement Format uses real counts and real file paths

- [ ] CI checks pass
